name: eventsphere
description: EventSphere — premium movie & live event booking platform for India

scripts.build: npm run build -w @eventsphere/database && npm run build -w @eventsphere/shared && npm run build -w @eventsphere/api && npm run build -w @eventsphere/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @eventsphere/api && npm run test -w @eventsphere/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @eventsphere/api && npm run lint -w @eventsphere/web
